story.iWant: comprehensive test frameworks configured for frontend and backend
story.soThat: I can write and run tests throughout development to ensure quality and prevent regressions

tasks.task: Install Frontend Test Dependencies - Install Playwright, Vitest, Faker.js, initialize Playwright browsers, verify all dependencies installed correctly

Configure Playwright for E2E Testing - Create playwright.config.ts with environment configurations, timeout standards, artifact outputs, environment switching, create tests/e2e/ directory, create example E2E test file

Configure Vitest for Unit Testing - Create vitest.config.ts for unit testing, configure coverage reporting, set up test environment, create __tests__/unit/ and __tests__/integration/ directories, create example unit test file

Configure Playwright Component Testing - Configure Playwright Component Testing, set up component test directory structure, create test utilities for component testing, create example component test file
Add Frontend Test Scripts - Add test:unit, test:integration, test:e2e, test:coverage, and test scripts to package.json, verify all scripts execute successfully

Verify Backend Jest Configuration - Review existing Jest configuration in package.json, verify test directory structure, verify coverage reporting configuration, update configuration if needed, create example unit test file

Configure Backend API Testing - Verify Supertest is installed, review existing E2E test configuration, create test/integration/ directory structure, configure test database connection, create example integration test file

Add Backend Test Scripts - Verify existing test script, add test:integration script, verify existing test:e2e and test:cov scripts, add alias test:coverage if needed, verify all scripts execute successfully
Create Test Data Factories - Install Faker.js in backend, create test data factory directory structure, create user, listing, and auction factories, create test fixtures for common scenarios
Create Test Utilities and Helpers - Create auth helpers, API helpers, database helpers, create test utilities directory structure, document helper usage

Configure Test Environment Variables - Create .env.test file for frontend and backend, configure test database connection, set up environment variable loading for tests, document test environment requirements

Configure CI/CD Test Integration - Create GitHub Actions workflow for frontend and backend tests, configure test execution on commits, configure test coverage reporting, configure test failure to block deployment, test CI/CD pipeline execution

Verify Test Execution - Run all frontend and backend test commands and verify success, verify test coverage reports generate correctly, verify CI/CD pipeline runs tests on test commit, document any issues found

Create Test Documentation - Create tests/README.md with test guidelines, document test patterns and conventions, provide examples of test structure, document test strategy alignment, include test execution instructions

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Frontend E2E Testing Setup - Playwright installed and configured for E2E testing, Playwright configuration file (playwright.config.ts) with environment switching, timeout standards (30s default, 60s for E2E), artifact outputs (screenshots, videos, traces), test data factories setup, test directory structure created (tests/e2e/), Playwright browsers installed

Frontend Unit Testing Setup - Vitest installed and configured for unit testing, Vitest configuration file (vitest.config.ts) with coverage reporting, test directory structure created (__tests__/unit/, __tests__/integration/), coverage reporting configured (c8/v8)
Frontend Component Testing Setup - Playwright Component Testing configured for component tests, component test directory structure created, test utilities for component testing
Frontend Test Scripts - Test scripts in package.json: npm run test:unit, npm run test:integration, npm run test:e2e, npm run test:coverage, npm run test (run all tests)

Backend Unit Testing Setup - Jest configured (already installed with NestJS), Jest configuration verified/updated in package.json or jest.config.js, test directory structure verified (src/**/*.spec.ts), coverage reporting configured

Backend API Testing Setup - Supertest installed and configured (already installed), test directory structure created (test/, test/integration/), E2E test configuration (test/jest-e2e.json - already exists), test database configuration (Supabase test project)

Backend Test Scripts - Test scripts in package.json: npm run test (unit tests - already exists), npm run test:integration, npm run test:e2e (already exists), npm run test:coverage (already exists as test:cov)

Test Data Infrastructure - Test data factories created (user, listing, auction factories), test fixtures and helpers setup, test utilities for common operations (auth helpers, API helpers), Faker.js or similar installed for generating test data
Test Environment Configuration - Test environment variables configured (.env.test), test database connection configured (separate Supabase test project), environment switching for test execution
CI/CD Test Integration - GitHub Actions workflow configured to run tests, test execution in CI/CD pipeline on commits, test coverage reporting in CI/CD, test failure blocks deployment
Test Execution Verification - All test commands execute successfully (even if no tests exist yet), test coverage reports generate correctly, CI/CD pipeline runs tests on commits
Test Documentation - tests/README.md created with test guidelines, test patterns and conventions documented, examples of test structure provided, test strategy alignment documented

doc.title: Test Strategy Document
doc.snippet: Frontend: Playwright for E2E, Vitest for unit, Playwright Component Testing for components. Backend: Jest for unit/integration, Supertest for API testing. Test pyramid: 60% unit, 30% integration, 10% E2E.

doc.title: Test Strategy Document
doc.snippet: Frontend: 70% code coverage. Backend: 80% code coverage. Critical paths: 100% coverage. Coverage enforcement in CI/CD pipeline.

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Foundation & Core Infrastructure
doc.snippet: Given I have frontend and backend projects set up, When I configure the test frameworks, Then Playwright, Vitest, Jest, and Supertest are installed and configured, And Test scripts are available in package.json, And CI/CD pipeline runs tests on commits.

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Foundation & Core Infrastructure
doc.snippet: Frontend E2E: Playwright (cross-browser: Chromium, Firefox, WebKit). Frontend Unit: Vitest (fast, Vite-powered). Frontend Component: Playwright Component Testing. Backend Unit/Integration: Jest (NestJS default). Backend API: Supertest (HTTP endpoint testing).

doc.title: Epics Document
doc.snippet: Frontend Test Setup: Playwright installed and configured for E2E testing, Vitest installed and configured for unit testing, Playwright Component Testing configured for component tests. Backend Test Setup: Jest installed and configured (NestJS default), Supertest installed for API testing, test database configuration (Supabase test project).

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Test frameworks: Playwright for E2E, Vitest for unit, Jest for backend, Supertest for API testing. Test coverage targets: Frontend 70%, Backend 80%, Critical paths 100%.

artifact.reason: Frontend package.json - currently has no test frameworks installed. Need to add Playwright, Vitest, and related dependencies. Need to add test scripts.

Backend package.json - Jest and Supertest already installed. Jest configuration exists in package.json. Need to verify configuration, add test:integration script, and ensure all test scripts are properly configured.
Example Jest unit test file - demonstrates NestJS testing module setup pattern. Can be used as reference for creating additional unit tests.
E2E test configuration file - already exists. Configures Jest for E2E tests with .e2e-spec.ts pattern. May need updates for integration test configuration.
Dummy data from Story 1.9 - can be used for test fixtures and E2E test scenarios. Includes miners, listings, testimonials, events data.

package.name: @playwright/test
package.reason: To be installed for E2E testing

package.name: vitest
package.reason: To be installed for unit testing

package.name: @vitest/ui
package.reason: To be installed for Vitest UI

package.name: @vitest/coverage-v8
package.reason: To be installed for coverage reporting

package.name: @faker-js/faker
package.reason: To be installed for test data generation

constraints.constraint: Test Pyramid Approach: Prioritize unit tests (60%), supplement with integration (30%), use E2E sparingly (10%)
Frontend Testing: Use Playwright for E2E, Vitest for unit, Playwright Component Testing for components
Backend Testing: Use Jest for unit/integration (NestJS default), Supertest for API testing
Test Coverage: Frontend 70%, Backend 80%, Critical paths 100%
Test Data: Use Faker.js for generating realistic test data, create factories for common entities (User, Listing, Auction)
Environment Separation: Use separate test database (Supabase test project) for testing
CI/CD Integration: Tests must run automatically on commits, test failure must block deployment
Test Directory Structure: Frontend - tests/e2e/, __tests__/unit/, __tests__/integration/. Backend - test/integration/, test/e2e/, test/factories/, test/helpers/, src/**/*.spec.ts
Coverage Reporting: Use c8/v8 for coverage reporting in both frontend and backend
Test Naming: Use descriptive test names following pattern: describe('Component/Service', () => { it('should do something', () => {}) })
Playwright Configuration: Environment switching (dev, staging, production), timeout standards (30s default, 60s for E2E), artifact outputs (screenshots, videos, traces)
TypeScript: All test files must use TypeScript, follow existing TypeScript configuration

tests.standards: Manual verification testing standards: Test frameworks must be configured and all test commands must execute successfully (even if no tests exist yet). Test coverage reports must generate correctly. CI/CD pipeline must run tests on commits. Test execution follows test pyramid: 60% unit, 30% integration, 10% E2E. Coverage targets: Frontend 70%, Backend 80%, Critical paths 100%. All test files use TypeScript. Test naming follows pattern: describe('Component/Service', () => { it('should do something', () => {}) }).

ideas.test: Test Playwright installation: Verify @playwright/test is installed, verify playwright.config.ts exists with correct configuration, verify Playwright browsers are installed, verify tests/e2e/ directory exists
Test Vitest installation: Verify vitest is installed, verify vitest.config.ts exists with coverage reporting configured, verify __tests__/unit/ and __tests__/integration/ directories exist
Test Playwright Component Testing: Verify Playwright Component Testing is configured, verify component test directory structure exists, verify test utilities for component testing exist

Test Frontend Test Scripts: Run npm run test:unit and verify it executes, run npm run test:integration and verify it executes, run npm run test:e2e and verify it executes, run npm run test:coverage and verify coverage report generates, run npm run test and verify all tests run

Test Backend Jest Configuration: Verify Jest configuration in package.json is correct, verify test directory structure (src/**/*.spec.ts) exists, verify coverage reporting is configured, verify example unit test file exists and runs

Test Backend API Testing: Verify Supertest is installed, verify test/jest-e2e.json exists and is configured correctly, verify test/integration/ directory exists, verify test database connection is configured, verify example integration test file exists and runs

Test Backend Test Scripts: Run npm run test and verify unit tests execute, run npm run test:integration and verify integration tests execute, run npm run test:e2e and verify E2E tests execute, run npm run test:coverage and verify coverage report generates

Test Test Data Infrastructure: Verify Faker.js is installed in backend, verify test/factories/ directory exists, verify user.factory.ts, listing.factory.ts, and auction.factory.ts exist, verify test fixtures exist, verify test helpers (auth.helper.ts, api.helper.ts, db.helper.ts) exist

Test Test Environment Configuration: Verify .env.test file exists for frontend, verify .env.test file exists for backend, verify test database connection is configured (Supabase test project), verify environment variable loading works for tests

Test CI/CD Test Integration: Verify GitHub Actions workflow for frontend tests exists, verify GitHub Actions workflow for backend tests exists, verify test execution is configured on commits, verify test coverage reporting is configured, verify test failure blocks deployment

Test Test Execution Verification: Run all frontend test commands and verify success, run all backend test commands and verify success, verify test coverage reports generate correctly, verify CI/CD pipeline runs tests on test commit

Test Test Documentation: Verify tests/README.md exists with test guidelines, verify test patterns and conventions are documented, verify examples of test structure are provided, verify test strategy alignment is documented
